title: Phone OTP signup/login (Kavenegar)
description: Phone-first auth via SMS OTP using Kavenegar API. Console fallback in dev. 3 OTP/10min rate limit. Redis-backed OTP storage with 5-min expiry.
acceptanceCriteria: User can sign up and log in via phone OTP on production. Kavenegar sends real SMS. Rate limiting prevents abuse.
risks: Kavenegar API key not configured for production. Without it, no phone signups work.

title: Email + password auth
description: Credentials provider with bcrypt hashing. Email + password login/signup flows via Auth.js v5.
acceptanceCriteria: User can sign up and log in with email + password. Password hashed with bcrypt.

title: Email verification flow
description: Nodemailer sends verification email with 24h token. Needs SMTP credentials for production.
acceptanceCriteria: User receives verification email after signup. Clicking link verifies account. Works on production SMTP.
risks: SMTP credentials not configured. Console fallback only in dev. Production email doesn't send.

title: Password reset flow
description: Forgot password generates 1h expiring token. Reset endpoint validates and updates password. Requires SMTP.
acceptanceCriteria: User can request password reset, receive email, and set new password.
risks: Depends on SMTP configuration.

title: User profiles & avatars
description: Profile update: name, bio, avatar (Sharp → WebP), tradingStyle, sessionPreference, preferredPairs.
acceptanceCriteria: User can edit profile, upload avatar, view other profiles.

title: Username system + availability check
description: Real-time debounced (500ms) availability check. Unique constraint at DB. Reserved username list.
acceptanceCriteria: Username selection works with real-time validation. Reserved names blocked.

title: JWT sessions (Auth.js v5)
description: JWT strategy with extended token: id, role, isPro, username, phone, onboardingComplete.
acceptanceCriteria: Sessions persist across requests. Token contains all required fields.

title: i18n + RTL support (en/fa)
description: 31 translation sections in both en.json and fa.json. Logical CSS properties only (ms/me/ps/pe). Client useTranslation() + server t().
acceptanceCriteria: All user-visible strings use t(). Persian translation is proper Farsi. RTL layout works.

title: EA/MetaTrader auth (register + login)
description: Username+password auth for MetaTrader EA. API key generation. One-time use login tokens via Redis.
acceptanceCriteria: EA can register, log in, and authenticate via API key for subsequent requests.

title: Referral tracking on signup
description: Fire-and-forget event tracking: LINK_COPIED, LINK_SHARED, SIGNUP, SUBSCRIPTION. Admin analytics dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Referral links track signups. Admin sees analytics with top referrers.

title: Statement upload + HTML parsing
description: Upload MT4/MT5 HTML statement files. Cheerio parser extracts: totalNetProfit, grossProfit/Loss, profitFactor, winRate, maxDrawdown. Stored as JSONB.
acceptanceCriteria: User uploads HTML statement → parser extracts metrics → stored in DB → displayed on profile.

title: Admin statement review/approval
description: Admin dashboard to review uploaded statements: view original HTML, approve/reject with notes. Status: PENDING/VERIFIED/REJECTED/EXPIRED.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can review, approve, or reject statements with notes.

title: MT account linking
description: User links multiple MT accounts via settings. MtAccount model: accountNumber, broker, platform, balance, equity, leverage. API key per account.
acceptanceCriteria: User can add/remove MT accounts. API key generated for each. EA connects via key.

title: Auto-recalculate trader statements
description: statement-calc.service.ts recalculates TraderStatements on trade close. Monthly, seasonal, all-time aggregation. Admin can force recalculation.
acceptanceCriteria: Trader statements auto-update when trades close. Admin can trigger manual recalc.

title: Clan CRUD + settings
description: Clan creation, editing, deletion. Settings: name (unique), description, avatar, tradingFocus, isPublic, tier (FREE/PRO). Creator becomes LEADER.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create/edit/delete clans. Roles work (LEADER, CO_LEADER, MEMBER).

title: Real-time chat (Socket.io)
description: Socket.io on /api/socketio. JWT auth. Rooms: clan:{id}, topic:{clanId}:{topicId}. Messages with replies, edits, deletes. 5msg/60s rate limit.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can send/receive messages in real-time. Replies, edits, deletes work. Rate limiting prevents spam.

title: Chat topics & threading
description: ChatTopic model with isDefault flag. Sort order. ACTIVE/ARCHIVED status. Create/edit/delete endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Clan leaders can create topics. Messages are scoped to topics. Archive works.

title: Signal & analysis trade cards
description: SIGNAL and ANALYSIS card types. Cards created via Socket.io with full validation. Rendered inline in chat. Version history for edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create SIGNAL/ANALYSIS cards. Cards render with entry/SL/TP. Edits tracked.

title: Trade tracking & lifecycle
description: Trade lifecycle: PENDING → OPEN → TP_HIT/SL_HIT/BE/CLOSED. Full status history with TradeEvent audit. Actions: SET_BE, MOVE_SL, CHANGE_TP, CLOSE.
acceptanceCriteria: Trade status progresses correctly. All state changes logged. Actions (BE/SL/TP/close) work.

title: Direct messages
description: 1:1 DMs with typing indicators, read receipts, image attachments (up to 4). Socket.io rooms: dm:{sortedUserIds}.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can send/receive DMs. Read receipts and typing indicators work.

title: Join requests + invite codes
description: Join requests (PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED) for private clans. Invite codes with expiry, maxUses, uses tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: Private clan join flow works. Invite codes with limits work.

title: Reactions, pinning, images, typing, presence
description: Emoji reactions on messages. Pin/unpin messages. Image uploads (up to 4, Sharp → WebP). Typing indicators via Socket.io. Redis presence (5min TTL).
acceptanceCriteria: All social features work: reactions, pinning, images, typing indicators, online presence.

title: Season management
description: Season model with UPCOMING/ACTIVE/COMPLETED/ARCHIVED lifecycle. Admin can create/edit/close seasons.
acceptanceCriteria: Seasons can be created, activated, and completed. Rankings scoped to seasons.

title: Multi-lens rankings (6 lenses)
description: Composite, profitFactor, winRate, consistency, riskAdjusted, lowRisk. Configurable weights. Min trade threshold.
acceptanceCriteria: Leaderboard shows rankings across 6 lenses. Admin can recalculate. Weights configurable.

title: Badge system (rank/perf/trophy)
description: 3 categories: rank (min_closed_trades), performance (metric rolling windows), trophy (season placement). Auto-evaluation, admin dry-run, recompute.
acceptanceCriteria: Badges auto-awarded on milestones. Admin can dry-run and recompute. Badge CRUD works.

title: Season results page
description: Final standings, awards, highlights after season ends. Not yet implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: After season ends, results page shows final standings, top performers, awards.

title: Channel feed & posts
description: ChannelPost model: title, content, images, isPremium. Telegram-style broadcast. View counts. Reactions.
acceptanceCriteria: Clan channel shows posts. Users can create posts with images. View counts track.

title: Auto-post from trade cards
description: High-signal trades auto-posted to channel. Feature-flag gated (auto_post). Tag matching against clan settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Trade cards with matching tags auto-post to channel when feature flag enabled.

title: Discover page + filters
description: Clans tab + Free Agents tab. Search, focus filter, tier filter. Public clans discoverable.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can discover public clans and free agents. Filters work.

title: Follow system
description: Follow model: followerId, followingType (USER/CLAN), followingId. Follow/unfollow with counts.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can follow/unfollow clans and users. Follower counts display correctly.

title: Economic calendar sync + event reminders
description: MT5 EA sends calendar events. Upsert with externalId+source uniqueness. Rate limiting (5-min window). Socket.io event reminders at 1h and 1min before.
acceptanceCriteria: Calendar events display. Reminders fire via Socket.io before high-impact events.

title: Stories system
description: DB model exists (Story: userId, imageUrl, expiresAt). No API routes or UI built. Ephemeral 24h content.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create stories (image + text). Stories expire after 24h. Viewable in feed.

title: Integrity contract (deny-by-default)
description: 6-condition eligibility check: MT-linked, integrityStatus, resolutionSource, card-before-trade timing, initial SL snapshot, no duplicate MT ticket. 12+ loopholes identified and fixed.
acceptanceCriteria: No trade is counted for rankings unless all 6 conditions pass. Reason codes displayed in UI. Unit tests pass.
risks: Complex logic — any regression could allow fraudulent trades to count.

title: Admin override governance
description: Admin can manually override trade eligibility. All overrides logged in TradeEvent with MANUAL_OVERRIDE reason. API returns 422 for ineligible trades.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can override. All overrides auditable. Non-admin cannot override.

title: EA/MetaTrader bridge (two-way)
description: EA→Server: heartbeat, trade-event, calendar. Server→EA: pending actions queue. Rate limiting on calendar sync. Action results tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: EA heartbeat works. Trade events sync. Pending actions delivered. Calendar events upserted.

title: Trade integrity evaluator (background)
description: Background job every 60s evaluating all pending trades. Feature-flag gated (trade_integrity_evaluator). Returns evaluated count, status changes, errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Background evaluator runs every 60s when flag enabled. Trades auto-evaluated.

title: Feature flags system
description: FeatureFlag model with Redis caching (60s TTL). Admin CRUD. 2 runtime-gated features: auto_post, trade_integrity_evaluator.
acceptanceCriteria: Feature flags toggle features at runtime. Redis cache prevents DB hit on every check.

title: Deploy pipeline (US build → Iran deploy)
description: 3 bash scripts: deploy-pack.sh (tarball on US), deploy-staging.sh (to staging), promote-to-prod.sh (with backup + auto-rollback + health check).
acceptanceCriteria: Deploy from US to Iran staging works. Promote to prod with auto-rollback works.

title: PM2 process management
description: ecosystem.config.cjs with auto-restart, 1GB memory limit, log rotation. Custom HTTP server wraps Next.js + Socket.io.
acceptanceCriteria: PM2 manages the process. Auto-restart on crash. Memory limit enforced.

title: Staging environment
description: Staging on port 3001, Redis DB 1. Separate .env. Health checks before promotion.
acceptanceCriteria: Staging environment isolated from prod. Can test before promoting.

title: Error monitoring (GlitchTip/Sentry)
description: Self-hosted Sentry alternative. No international API dependency. Not yet implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: Production errors captured, alerting enabled, dashboard accessible.
risks: No error monitoring means production bugs go undetected.

title: CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions)
description: Lint + type-check + build on push. No GitHub Actions workflows exist.
acceptanceCriteria: Every push triggers lint + type-check + build. PRs block on failure.
risks: Without CI, broken code can be deployed.

title: Structured logging (Pino)
description: Replace 150+ console.log calls with JSON structured logging via Pino. Not implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: All server-side logging uses Pino. JSON log output. Log levels enforced.

title: Automated database backups
description: No automated pg_dump script or cron job. Only manual snapshots during deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Daily automated pg_dump cron job. Backups stored safely. Restore drill documented and tested.
risks: Data loss on server failure without automated backups.

title: Uptime monitoring + Telegram alerts
description: Cron health check script with Telegram bot notifications. Not implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: External monitor checks /health every minute. Telegram alert on downtime.

title: Health check API endpoint
description: No /api/health endpoint exists. Deployment scripts use homepage HTTP check only.
acceptanceCriteria: /api/health returns DB + Redis + Socket.io connectivity status. Used by monitoring.
risks: Cannot properly monitor without a health endpoint.

title: Rate limiting coverage
description: Currently: OTP (3/10min), chat (5/60s), EA heartbeat. Missing: API routes, auth endpoints, image uploads, admin actions.
acceptanceCriteria: All public endpoints have rate limiting. Auth endpoints have aggressive limits.
risks: Missing rate limits on some endpoints could lead to abuse.

title: Security audit (OWASP top 10)
description: No formal security audit conducted. Input validation via Zod exists. Auth checks on admin routes exist.
acceptanceCriteria: OWASP top-10 review completed. All findings addressed. Report documented.
risks: Undetected vulnerabilities in a financial platform.

title: E2E test suite (Playwright)
description: 29 test specs: auth, clans, members, join requests, invites, chat, topics, trades, DMs, posts, discovery, leaderboard, permissions, rate-limiting, badges, EA, watchlist, journal, admin, settings, referrals.
acceptanceCriteria: All 29 E2E specs pass. Admin test runner works.

title: PWA + service worker + offline
description: Full service worker with cache strategies. Offline page. LRU eviction. Install prompts.
acceptanceCriteria: App installable on mobile. Offline page shows when disconnected. Caches work.

title: Mobile responsive polish
description: Telegram-like layout on mobile. Bottom nav, hamburger menu, overflow fixes. Partially complete.
acceptanceCriteria: All critical flows work on mobile. No horizontal overflow. Touch targets meet 44px minimum.
risks: Iranian users are primarily mobile — broken mobile UX loses majority of users.

title: SEO (OG tags, sitemap, canonical)
description: Basic metadata exists. Missing: OG images, sitemap.ts, robots.ts, structured data.
acceptanceCriteria: Proper OG images, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, canonical URLs.

title: Onboarding flow (intent + missions)
description: Intent modal (4 options: LEARN/COMPETE/SHARE/RECRUIT) done. Missions dashboard exists. No guided tour.
acceptanceCriteria: New users see intent modal → missions checklist. Completing missions unlocks badges.

title: ZarinPal payment gateway
description: Primary Iranian payment gateway. Node.js SDK. Not implemented at all — no code, no SDK.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can pay via ZarinPal. Payment verified server-side. Receipt stored.
risks: ZarinPal sandbox testing required. Toman pricing.

title: Subscription checkout flow
description: SubscriptionPlan model + admin CRUD exists. No checkout flow, no payment verification, no subscription enforcement.
acceptanceCriteria: User selects plan → pays via ZarinPal → subscription activated → isPro flag set.
risks: Depends on ZarinPal integration.

title: Paywall enforcement
description: PaywallRule model + admin CRUD exists. applyPaywall() function exists but is NEVER called in production API routes.
acceptanceCriteria: Paywall rules are enforced at API boundaries. Non-pro users see redacted content.
risks: Infrastructure exists but zero enforcement. All content is currently free.

title: Channel subscription marketplace
description: Clans set price, 70-80% split. Browse, preview, subscribe. Not implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: Clans can set subscription price. Users can subscribe. Revenue split applied.

title: Landing page + marketing
description: Landing page with hero, features, stats, CTA sections. Self-hosted.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page renders correctly in both languages. CTA drives signups.

title: AIRouter service (failover chain)
description: OpenRouter → Ollama → Cache. 3s timeout, health checks, admin force-local toggle. Not implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: AIRouter transparently routes queries. Failover works. Admin can force local mode.
risks: Requires AI server provisioning. Ollama models need GPU or large RAM.

title: Spectator AI chatbot
description: 3 free questions/day for non-pro users. System prompt with DB query access. Not implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: Non-pro users can ask 3 questions/day. AI responds with platform data context.

title: Clan AI assistant (@ai mention)
description: Pro-only AI assistant in clan chat. @ai trigger. Clan context injected. Not implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: @ai mention in chat triggers AI response with clan context.

title: Blackout resilience test
description: Block international traffic on production. Verify all features work on NIN-only. Not tested.
acceptanceCriteria: Every feature works without international internet. AI falls back to local. Payments work on NIN.
risks: Unknown failure modes under blackout conditions.

title: Automated PostgreSQL backups
description: pg_dump cron job with 7-day retention + test restore drill.
acceptanceCriteria: Automated daily pg_dump runs. Backups stored with 7-day retention. Restore drill completed successfully.
risks: Large DB size may slow dump. Need offsite backup storage.

title: Self-hosted error tracking (GlitchTip)
description: Deploy GlitchTip on dev/prod for production error capture, alerting, and dashboard. No external SaaS dependency.
acceptanceCriteria: GlitchTip running. Next.js errors auto-reported. Alert rules configured. Dashboard accessible to admin.
risks: GlitchTip Docker compose needs stable server resources. Must not impact app performance.

title: Zod env validation at startup
description: Fail-fast on missing or invalid environment variables using Zod schema validation at server startup.
acceptanceCriteria: Server refuses to start if required env vars are missing. Clear error messages indicate which vars are missing.

title: Rate limiting on all public routes
description: Rate limiting on login, signup, reset, and all public API routes. Extends existing OTP + chat rate limits.
acceptanceCriteria: All public-facing routes have rate limits. Auth endpoints have aggressive limits. Rate limit headers returned in responses.
risks: Too aggressive limits could block legitimate users. Need careful tuning.

title: /api/health endpoint
description: /api/health returning DB + Redis + Socket.io connectivity status as JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: /api/health returns JSON with DB, Redis, and Socket.io status. Returns 503 if any service is down.

title: Iran VPS setup
description: Iran VPS setup: PostgreSQL, Redis, Node.js, nginx, SSL certificate. Production-ready server configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: Iran VPS running with PostgreSQL, Redis, Node.js, nginx, and valid SSL. All services start on boot.
risks: Iranian hosting providers may have limited resources. SSL renewal must work without international access.

title: Kavenegar OTP on Iran prod
description: Kavenegar OTP configured and tested on Iran staging + production servers.
acceptanceCriteria: OTP SMS delivered to real Iranian phone numbers from production server. Rate limiting and console fallback work.
risks: Kavenegar may have latency from Iran VPS. API key scope must match production domain.

title: SMTP for production email
description: SMTP configured for production email verification and password reset flows.
acceptanceCriteria: Verification and reset emails delivered from production. SPF/DKIM configured. No emails landing in spam.
risks: Iranian SMTP providers may have deliverability issues. Need SPF/DKIM/DMARC setup.

title: Deploy pipeline to Iran end-to-end
description: Run deploy pipeline to Iran (staging then prod) end-to-end and verify all services work.
acceptanceCriteria: Full deploy from US build to Iran staging, then promote to prod. Health checks pass. Rollback tested.
risks: Network between US and Iran may be slow/unreliable for tarball transfer.

title: Mobile audit
description: Mobile audit: fix horizontal scroll, touch targets, keyboard overlap across all critical flows.
acceptanceCriteria: No horizontal scroll on any page. All touch targets >= 44px. Keyboard does not overlap inputs. Tested on iPhone SE and Android.
risks: May surface many small issues requiring iterative fixes.

title: Signal cards readable on mobile
description: Signal cards (R:R, instruments, actions) readable and usable on mobile viewports.
acceptanceCriteria: Signal cards render without overflow on 375px viewport. All data (R:R, entry, SL, TP) visible. Action buttons tappable.

title: Modals and sheets on mobile
description: Modals/bottom sheets closable on mobile + empty states guide the user to the next step.
acceptanceCriteria: All modals dismissible via swipe/tap-outside on mobile. Empty states show clear CTA for next action.

title: RTL visual regression tests
description: RTL visual regression tests using Playwright on mobile and desktop viewports.
acceptanceCriteria: Playwright screenshot tests for key pages in RTL mode. CI fails on visual diff beyond threshold.
risks: Screenshot tests can be flaky across environments. Need consistent font rendering.

title: Manual E2E integrity test
description: Manual E2E test verifying all 6 integrity conditions are enforced end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 integrity conditions tested manually with real EA. Each condition blocks ineligible trades. Results documented.

title: Statement recalculation accuracy check
description: Statement recalculation accuracy check versus manual calculation for sample traders.
acceptanceCriteria: Statement metrics match manual spreadsheet calculation for 3+ sample traders. Any discrepancies identified and fixed.

title: Statement performance test
description: Performance test: statement calculation with 500+ trades to ensure it completes in acceptable time.
acceptanceCriteria: Statement recalculation for 500+ trades completes in < 10 seconds. No timeouts or memory issues.
risks: May need query optimization or pagination for very large trade sets.

title: Exploit regression tests
description: Regression tests for known exploits: analysis upgrade loophole, retroactive match exploit, and other documented integrity bypasses.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover all 12+ known loopholes. Each test verifies the exploit is blocked. Tests run in CI.

title: Alpha invite batch
description: Invite 10-20 traders, create 2-3 curated clans for alpha testing.
acceptanceCriteria: 10-20 alpha testers onboarded. 2-3 clans created with active members. Feedback collection mechanism in place.
risks: Finding engaged alpha testers may take time. Need clear onboarding instructions.

title: Alpha bug-fix buffer
description: Bug-fix buffer for issues discovered during alpha feedback period (3-5 days).
acceptanceCriteria: All P0 bugs from alpha feedback triaged and fixed. No critical regressions remain.
risks: Scope of alpha bugs is unpredictable. May need more than 5 days.

title: MT quote storage
description: MarketPricePoint model + store prices from EA heartbeat into database for historical reference.
acceptanceCriteria: MarketPricePoint model in schema. EA heartbeat prices persisted to DB. Query by symbol + time range works.
risks: High write volume from frequent heartbeats. May need table partitioning or TTL cleanup.

title: OHLC candle aggregation
description: OHLC candle aggregation from MT ticks at multiple timeframes (1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, 4h, 1d).
acceptanceCriteria: Candles aggregated from tick data for all 6 timeframes. Candle table queryable by symbol + timeframe + range.
risks: Aggregation logic must handle gaps in tick data gracefully.

title: Symbol normalization resolver
description: Symbol normalization resolver: map broker-specific names (XAUUSD vs GOLD, suffixes like .m, .a) to canonical symbols.
acceptanceCriteria: Resolver maps any broker symbol to canonical form. Configurable alias table. Used in all quote storage and display.
risks: Broker symbol variations are vast. Need community-editable alias table.

title: Price freshness rules
description: Price freshness: mark symbol as stale if no update received in X seconds. Show warning in UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Stale prices detected and flagged. UI shows warning badge on stale symbols. Configurable staleness threshold per symbol type.

title: Market data health dashboard
description: Admin dashboard showing live/stale symbols, last update times, and data pipeline health.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin page shows all tracked symbols with live/stale status, last tick time, and connected EA count.

title: OpenRouter client wrapper
description: OpenRouter client wrapper with retries, rate limits, prompt versioning, and LLMRunRecord table for cost/latency tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: Wrapper handles retries and rate limits. Every LLM call logged to LLMRunRecord. Prompt versions tracked. Admin can view cost dashboard.
risks: OpenRouter may be unreachable from Iran. Need fallback strategy or proxy.

title: Typed contracts (Zod schemas)
description: Typed contracts: MarketSnapshot, EventCard, BriefingRecord Zod schemas for consistent data shapes across the pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: Zod schemas defined and exported. All pipeline services use these schemas for validation. Type inference works in TypeScript.

title: NewsItem model
description: NewsItem model + enums added to Prisma schema for news data storage.
acceptanceCriteria: NewsItem model with category, impact, sentiment, instruments, region fields. Migration applied. CRUD queries work.

title: RSS fetcher service
description: RSS fetcher service pulling from Investing.com, ForexLive, Al Jazeera, Reuters feeds.
acceptanceCriteria: RSS feeds parsed and normalized. New items stored in DB. Handles feed errors gracefully. Configurable feed list.
risks: RSS feeds may be blocked from Iran. Need to test accessibility from both US and Iran servers.

title: Finnhub + NewsData.io API fetcher
description: Finnhub + NewsData.io API fetcher with rate limiting and fallback between providers.
acceptanceCriteria: Both APIs fetched with proper rate limiting. Fallback to secondary if primary fails. API keys configurable.
risks: API rate limits may be restrictive on free tiers. International APIs may be slow from Iran.

title: News dedup engine
description: Dedup engine using externalId hash vs DB to prevent duplicate news items from multiple sources.
acceptanceCriteria: Duplicate articles from different sources detected and merged. Hash-based dedup works for exact matches. Fuzzy title matching for near-duplicates.

title: AI news classifier
description: OpenRouter AI classifier assigning category, instruments, impact level, sentiment, and summary to each news item.
acceptanceCriteria: Each news item classified with category, instruments, impact (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), sentiment, and 1-2 sentence summary. Prompt versioned.
risks: Classification quality depends on prompt engineering. Need validation against manual classification.

title: News cron worker
description: Cron worker running every 2 minutes: fetch → dedup → classify → store → Socket.io push to connected clients.
acceptanceCriteria: Worker runs on schedule. Full pipeline executes without errors. New items pushed via Socket.io in real time.
risks: Worker must not block the main event loop. Need proper error isolation.

title: News API endpoint
description: GET /api/news with pagination and filters by category, impact, instrument, and region.
acceptanceCriteria: API returns paginated news with all filter combinations. createdAt-based pagination. Zod-validated query params.

title: News image proxy
description: Image proxy /api/news/image/[id] to serve news images without external CDN dependency at runtime.
acceptanceCriteria: Images fetched and cached locally on first request. Subsequent requests served from cache. No external image URLs in client HTML.
risks: Image caching may consume significant disk space. Need LRU eviction.

title: News page UI
description: /news page with news feed, filters, live indicator, and news cards.
acceptanceCriteria: News page renders feed with cards. Filters work (category, impact, instrument). Live indicator shows when new items arrive. RTL layout correct.

title: Admin manual EventCard posting
description: Manual admin tool for posting EventCards (breaking news, market alerts) directly.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can create EventCards with title, body, impact, instruments. Card pushed to news feed and Socket.io immediately.

title: ContextBuilder service
description: ContextBuilder service that builds MarketSnapshot from MT data + news for AI consumption.
acceptanceCriteria: MarketSnapshot built from latest prices + recent news. Snapshot includes top movers, high-impact news, and session context. Typed with Zod schema.
risks: Snapshot quality depends on data freshness. Stale data produces misleading snapshots.

title: Daily briefing generator
description: Daily briefing generator: per-asset + overall market summary via OpenRouter.
acceptanceCriteria: Daily briefing generated automatically. Covers major assets and overall market. Stored as BriefingRecord. Prompt versioned.
risks: LLM cost per briefing needs monitoring. Quality depends on snapshot completeness.

title: Briefing UI
description: Briefing UI: show daily briefing in app, share to clan, 'why this matters' explainer.
acceptanceCriteria: Briefing card renders in home feed. Users can share to clan chat. 'Why this matters' section explains relevance to user's portfolio.

title: Per-asset mini-briefing
description: Per-asset mini-briefing: click instrument to see AI summary of recent price action and news.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking an instrument shows AI-generated summary. Summary includes price trend, key news, and trading session context.
risks: Per-asset briefings multiply LLM costs. May need caching strategy.

title: Prompt versioning + A/B testing
description: Prompt versioning and A/B testing infrastructure for all AI-generated content.
acceptanceCriteria: Prompts stored with version numbers. A/B split configurable per prompt. Results tracked in LLMRunRecord for comparison.

title: Vibe input UI
description: Vibe input UI: text field where user types their market thesis (e.g., 'I think gold will go up because...').
acceptanceCriteria: User can type free-text thesis. Submit triggers vibe parsing. Input validates minimum length. RTL text input works.

title: ParsedVibe extraction
description: ParsedVibe extraction via OpenRouter: direction, instrument, conviction level, and reasoning from free-text input.
acceptanceCriteria: Free-text parsed into structured ParsedVibe (direction, instrument, conviction, reasoning). Handles ambiguous input gracefully.
risks: LLM may misparse ambiguous vibes. Need confidence scoring and user confirmation.

title: TradePlanCandidate builder
description: TradePlanCandidate builder using deterministic math. LLM NEVER does position sizing or R:R calculations.
acceptanceCriteria: Trade plan generated with entry, SL, TP, position size using deterministic formulas. R:R calculated. Plan matches user risk settings.
risks: Plan quality depends on accurate market data. Must never use LLM for numeric calculations.

title: Paper position creation
description: Confirm flow creates PaperPositionRecord (paper trading). Market snapshot locked at creation time.
acceptanceCriteria: User confirms plan, paper position created. Market snapshot frozen at creation. Position appears in paper portfolio.

title: Paper position lifecycle
description: Paper position lifecycle: open → tracking → closed, using MT-derived prices for P&L calculation.
acceptanceCriteria: Paper positions track live P&L using MT prices. Auto-close on SL/TP hit. Manual close supported. Full lifecycle logged.
risks: Requires reliable MT price feed. Stale prices could miss SL/TP triggers.

title: Outcome scoring
description: OutcomeRecord scoring: realized R, timing accuracy, direction correctness for each closed paper position.
acceptanceCriteria: Closed positions scored on realized R, timing, and direction. Score stored in OutcomeRecord. Aggregatable for user statistics.

title: Paper portfolio dashboard
description: Paper portfolio dashboard: open positions, P&L, and trade history.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows open paper positions with live P&L. Closed positions with results. Summary stats (win rate, avg R, total P&L).

title: Replay UI
description: Replay UI: show vibe → snapshot → plan → outcome side-by-side for learning review.
acceptanceCriteria: Replay view shows full trade journey: original vibe, market snapshot at entry, generated plan, and final outcome side-by-side.

title: VibeScoreProfile
description: VibeScoreProfile: rolling accuracy tracking and pattern detection across user's vibe history.
acceptanceCriteria: User profile shows rolling vibe accuracy (30d, 90d, all-time). Patterns detected (e.g., 'better at gold than forex'). Score visible on profile.
risks: Need sufficient data points before patterns are meaningful. Minimum threshold required.

title: Behavioral insights
description: Behavioral insights from trade history: overtrading detection, revenge trading patterns, time-of-day analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: System detects overtrading, revenge trading, and session-based patterns. Insights shown on user dashboard with actionable suggestions.
risks: Pattern detection requires sufficient trade history. New users will see empty insights.

title: Weekly coaching digest
description: Automated weekly coaching digest: personalized trading review with AI-generated insights.
acceptanceCriteria: Weekly digest generated per user. Covers trade performance, behavioral patterns, and improvement suggestions. Delivered in-app and optionally via email.
risks: LLM cost scales with user count. Need batching strategy.

title: Watch tasks
description: Watch tasks: user sets conditions like 'alert me when XAUUSD > 2400' and receives notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create price alerts with conditions. Alerts fire when condition met. Supports >, <, cross above/below. Max 10 active alerts per user.
risks: Alert evaluation frequency must balance accuracy vs performance.

title: Alert pipeline
description: Alert pipeline: Socket.io push + optional email/in-app notification for triggered alerts.
acceptanceCriteria: Triggered alerts delivered via Socket.io in real time. Optional email delivery. In-app notification center shows alert history.

title: Send plan to MT
description: Send trade plan to MetaTrader as pending action. Requires explicit user confirmation before execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Trade plan sent to EA as pending action. User must confirm. EA executes on confirmation. Result reported back.
risks: Execution errors could cause financial loss. Must have explicit confirmation and safety checks.

title: Money management presets
description: Money management presets: fixed lot, percentage risk, max daily loss. Applied to trade plans before execution.
acceptanceCriteria: User configures money management preset. Preset applied to all generated trade plans. Position size calculated per preset rules.
risks: Incorrect position sizing could cause outsized losses. Math must be verified with tests.

title: Emergency close all positions
description: Emergency button to close all open positions across all linked MT accounts immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Kill switch closes all open positions. Confirmation dialog prevents accidental trigger. All close actions logged. Works even if individual close fails (retry logic).
risks: Network issues could prevent close commands from reaching EA. Need timeout and retry handling.

title: Execution journal
description: Auto-log all executed trades with full context: plan, snapshot, vibe, entry, exit, result.
acceptanceCriteria: Every executed trade logged with full context chain (vibe → plan → execution → outcome). Journal searchable and filterable. Exportable as CSV.
